title: elymus trachycaulus var. unilateralis
intro: Elymus trachycaulus var. unilateralis, also known as the one-sided wheat grass or one-sided wildrye, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Elymus trachycaulus var. unilateralis include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
